name: Reverb (audio chain v1)
author: KB2UKA
description: Subtle Schroeder reverb — fifth and final block in the Zeus voice audio chain v1 per issue #332. Four parallel comb filters with low-pass damping in the feedback path produce the decaying density; two series allpass filters diffuse the comb output so the tail doesn't ring. Tuned for ham-radio TX sweetening, not music — Mix defaults conservative so it sits behind the voice rather than washing over it. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
